product_data.Features: 16-inch Liquid Retina XDR display, Apple M3 Pro chip, 18GB unified memory, 512GB SSD, 22-hour battery life, MagSafe 3 charging, Thunderbolt 4 ports

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello, I'm very interested in the Apple MacBook Pro 16-inch (M3 Pro). It looks like a fantastic machine. I wanted to ask if there might be any flexibility on the price?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I'm glad to hear you're interested in the MacBook Pro 16-inch (M3 Pro)! While I can't go below the Wholesale Price of $1,800, I can certainly explore some options to see what could work for you.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate you exploring options. If $1,800 is truly the lowest you can go, I can accept that price.
